h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, large font size, used for table titles and major section starts.
h1.example_text: Table: Provisional Results of Registration of Candidates on 8 March 2022...

h2.visual_description: Not explicitly present in this sample, but likely used for sub-sections within chapters.

visual_matchers.pattern: Alternating light blue and white row shading in tables
Small grey text at the bottom left with a horizontal separator line

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Standard LaTeX (not present in sample, but recommended for technical reports)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numeric indices (e.g., text^21) corresponding to a footer list.

margin_noise_patterns.header: Right-aligned grey text indicating chapter/section title (e.g., 'Political Parties...')
